name: Zheshang Huijin Dingying Event-driven Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund(LOF)
summary: Zheshang Huijin Dingying Event-driven Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund(LOF) is an event-driven flexible allocation mixed fund managed by Zheshang Huijin Asset Management. It invests in a mix of equities and bonds based on event-driven strategies. The fund is based in China.
